title: Automatically switch theme based on OS theme
author: rforced

findings.description: autoTheme added to defaultAppThemes but Settings.General.stories.storyshot snapshot was not regenerated. If storyshot tests run in CI this will fail. Run 'npm run storyshots -- -u' to update.

PR title 'Automatically switch theme based on OS theme' does not follow 'area: Component: Description' project convention (e.g. 'frontend: Settings: Add auto OS theme'). Maintainer requests commit-guideline fixes before approving.

osColorScheme in useMemo deps is redundant — currentAppTheme is already reactive to OS changes via usePrefersColorScheme() inside useCurrentAppTheme(). The eslint-disable comment could also be removed.
getOsColorScheme() duplicates the synchronous window.matchMedia check from usePrefersColorScheme(). Minor duplication; consider extracting a shared helper.
ThemePreview correctly renders split light/dark preview for auto tile without ever passing unresolved autoTheme to createMuiTheme.
Four new getThemeName test cases cover OS-dark, OS-light, and backend defaultDarkTheme/defaultLightTheme overrides for the auto preference.
autoTheme placed first in defaultAppThemes, making it the most prominent option — good UX positioning.
